title: DeleteFileOptions
description:
DeleteFileOptions options for deleting files (used for other File structs below)
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)

branch.description: branch (optional) to base this file from. if not given, the default branch is used

force_overwrite_new_branch.description: (optional) will do a force-push if the new branch already exists

message.description: message (optional) for the commit of this file. if not supplied, a default message will be used

new_branch.description: new_branch (optional) will make a new branch from `branch` before creating the file

sha.description: sha is the SHA for the file that already exists

signoff.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer at the end of the commit log message.
